name: IContextReducer
description: Contract for pluggable context reduction strategies. Port for context-window management in chat-based primitives. Implementations provide strategies such as summarization, semantic selection, or sliding-window approaches to replace FIFO truncation.

methods.name: reduce
methods.description: Reduce a message list to fit within a token budget. Receives the full message history and returns a subset (or transformed version) that fits within the given token budget.

behavioral_expectations: Must implement structural subtyping (Protocol) — no explicit inheritance required
Tool-call assistant messages and their corresponding tool-response messages must be kept as atomic pairs — dropping one side produces invalid sequences
The returned list must fit within token_budget
Message ordering must be preserved — no reordering allowed
reduce() must return valid message sequences (each dict containing at least 'role' and 'content' keys)
